RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0003 Page 1 of 5 Statement of Account Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 24/09/2025 UTILITY BILL 530 - 2,420 09/01/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 2,037 4,457 02/02/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - 1,774 6,231 25/10/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 505 1,502 7,228 15/05/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 7,228 13/10/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 7,228 14/08/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 379 - 6,849 26/12/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - - 6,849 18/06/2025 UTILITY BILL - 969 7,818 12/08/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 7,818 05/08/2025 UTILITY BILL - 996 8,814 26/03/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 513 - 8,301 24/04/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 8,301 10/04/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 1,505 9,806 08/08/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 781 - 9,025 24/03/2025 UTILITY BILL 893 192 8,324 26/09/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 8,324 28/07/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 1,718 10,042
